diagrams.title: Firewall Types Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows the evolution and layers of firewall technologies from basic to advanced
diagrams.purpose: Understanding firewall sophistication levels and capabilities

diagrams.title: DMZ Network Architecture
diagrams.description: Three-zone security model with external internet, DMZ, and internal network
elements: Internet (Untrusted) → External Firewall → DMZ (Web/Email servers) → Internal Firewall → Internal Network (Database/Private)
Shows traffic flow rules between zones
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing secure network segmentation and firewall placement

diagrams.title: DDoS Attack Flow
diagrams.description: Illustrates how botnets are used to launch distributed denial of service attacks
elements: Botmaster controls Botnet (thousands of compromised zombies)
All zombies simultaneously send requests to Target
Target becomes overwhelmed and unavailable to legitimate users
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the scale and mechanism of DDoS attacks
